pages.text: $(l)Identity$()$(br2)SCP-087, The Stairwell is built around an endless dark staircase and the creatures waiting inside it.$(br2)$(l)Impression$()$(br2)It feels less like meeting a normal mob and more like entering a place that is already wrong.

pages.title: Behavior
pages.text: $(l)Presence$()$(br2)The horror comes from the structure itself, the darkness, and what waits below.$(br2)$(l)Fear Style$()$(br2)It creates fear by forcing the player deeper into a place that keeps feeling worse.
